title: Upwelling Nutrients
script_summary: Exploring the science behind upwelling nutrients and their impact on marine ecosystems.

segments.voiceover: Science has a clearer story about upwelling nutrients than social media does.
Upwelling occurs when deep, nutrient-rich water rises to the surface.
This process fuels ocean life, creating flourishing ecosystems.
Studies show areas of upwelling have the highest marine productivity.
Understanding this helps us protect vital marine resources.
Curious about more ocean science? Hit subscribe and dive deeper!
